/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ui_sim.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/ui_sim.dir/storage/Code/j6p_0330/Sample/Claude/AgentIndicator/firmware/main/ui/screens/screens.c.o CMakeFiles/ui_sim.dir/storage/Code/j6p_0330/Sample/Claude/AgentIndicator/firmware/main/ui/screens/screen_wifi.c.o CMakeFiles/ui_sim.dir/storage/Code/j6p_0330/Sample/Claude/AgentIndicator/firmware/main/ui/screens/screen_devices.c.o CMakeFiles/ui_sim.dir/storage/Code/j6p_0330/Sample/Claude/AgentIndicator/firmware/main/ui/screens/screen_files.c.o CMakeFiles/ui_sim.dir/storage/Code/j6p_0330/Sample/Claude/AgentIndicator/firmware/main/ui/screens/screen_music.c.o CMakeFiles/ui_sim.dir/storage/Code/j6p_0330/Sample/Claude/AgentIndicator/firmware/main/ui/screens/screen_light.c.o -o ui_sim  lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl.a -lm lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_thorvg.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_examples.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_demos.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_thorvg.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_examples.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_demos.a
